mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM zhs_order WHERE user_id IN
#{userId}
SELECT * FROM zhs_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO zhs_order (out_trade_no, open_id, amount, status, payment_status, created_at, paid_at, product_id, order_type, activity_id, product_identity_id, pay_type) VALUES (#{outTradeNo}, #{openId}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{paymentStatus}, #{createdAt}, #{paidAt}, #{productId}, #{orderType}, #{activityId}, #{productIdentityId}, #{payType})
mapper.update: update zhs_order set status = #{status} where out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM zhs_order WHERE user_id IN
#{userId}

SELECT SUM(amount) FROM zhs_order WHERE user_id IN
#{userId}

SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM zhs_order WHERE user_id IN
#{userId}
select product_id from zhs_order where open_id = #{openId}
select out_trade_no from zhs_order where open_id = #{openId}
mapper.sql: select id, user_id, out_trade_no, open_id, amount, status, payment_status, created_at, paid_at, product_id, order_type, refund_time, refund_reason ,(select u.nickname from zhs_user u where u.id = user_id ) nickname from zhs_order
